---
title: "&nbsp;&nbsp;Fredd Villabona C."
subtitle: "Working as a Data Scientist on Fiverr. <br>Cybersecurity at Fiverr.<br>[Resume](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tK3Pr6gwD0YipuBWaxsrwVTeCnOuY7V82V6s0LOSIXk/edit?usp=sharing) | [ProgramandoenR](https://freddyvillabona.github.io/fv/programandoenr.html) | R Views<br>Syndicated on [R-Bloggers]() & R Weekly<br>|> May all dreams come true! 🤍"
format:
  lumo-html: 
    logo: "a.jpg"                                         # Optional. Path to 
    primary-color: "#2a45b0"
    self-contained: true
    is-particlejs-enabled: true                           # Optional: display 
about:
    template: jolla
    links:
    - icon: instagram
      text: freddvillabona
      href: https://instagram.com/freddvillabona
      
    - icon: instagram
      text: programandoenr
      href: https://instagram.com/programandoenr
      
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/freddvillabona
      
    - icon: facebook
      href: https://facebook.com/programandoenr
      
    - icon: github
      href: https://freddyvillabona.github.io/fv/
      
    - icon: telegram
      href: https://t.me/programandoinr
      
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:freddyvillabonac@gmail.com

    - text: linKedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/freddvillabona/
      
    - text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/freddvillabona.bsky.social
---
